headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $24
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Patrick Scholes   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Buy and raises the price target from $23 to $24.

headline: Top Dividend Stocks To Consider In May 2026
summary: The United States market has shown robust performance, rising 1.2% over the last week and 29% over the past year, with earnings projected to grow by 17% annually. In this dynamic environment, selecting dividend stocks that offer reliable income and potential for capital appreciation can be an effective strategy for investors looking to benefit from both current returns and future growth.
